name: Stigmergy
author: Luis Bolaños Mures & Steven Metzger (2021) / AGP port
description: Bolaños Mures & Metzger's drawless line-of-sight territory game (2021), based on Tumbleweed but with single flippable stones instead of stacks. Place a stone on an empty cell your opponent doesn't control, or flip an enemy stone on a cell you do control — control means more than half of a cell's neighbours' worth of your stones can see it. Most stones plus controlled territory wins.
